import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './index.css'; // Projects Data (No scores, all have live links) const PROJECTS = [ { id: '01', name: 'Vivasayi Farm App', date: '24 Aug 2025', live: 'https://vivasayi-wheat.vercel.app', tech: ['Next.js', 'Supabase'], color: 'var(--color-green)' }, { id: '02', name: 'Havan Transit Engine', date: '12 Sep 2025', live: 'https://havan-bus-booking-engine.vercel.app', tech: ['Django', 'React'], color: 'var(--color-yellow)' }, { id: '03', name: 'Havan Vision AI Chat', date: '04 Oct 2025', live: 'https://github.com/Madhavan-dev18/havan-vision', tech: ['Flask', 'LLaMA'], color: 'var(--color-blue)' }, { id: '04', name: 'Havan Stream HLS', date: '18 Nov 2025', live: 'https://github.com/Madhavan-dev18/havan-stream', tech: ['Vite', 'Django'], color: 'var(--color-pink)' } ]; // Stats Data const STATS = [ { title: 'Live Deployments', value: '4/4', percent: '100%', color: 'var(--color-green)', date: 'Ongoing' }, { title: 'CVEs Patched', value: '3/3', percent: '100%', color: 'var(--color-yellow)', date: 'Verified' }, { title: 'Test Coverage', value: '73 Passing', percent: '85%', color: 'var(--color-blue)', date: 'CI/CD' } ]; // Experience Data const EXP = [ { date: 'May 2025', title: 'Python Developer Intern', desc: 'Built Django bus reservation system with SQLite and row-level locking.', label: 'NextGen Tech', btnColor: 'var(--color-purple)' }, { date: '2023 - 2026', title: 'B.Sc. Computer Science', desc: 'Thiruvalluvar University. Active placement-season candidate.', label: 'KMG College', btnColor: 'var(--color-blue)' } ]; export default function App() { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('dashboard'); return (
{/* SIDEBAR */}

setActiveTab('dashboard')}>

))}

✓

{proj.date}
LIVE ↗
))}

📅 Due: {e.date}
{e.title}
{e.desc}
{e.label}
))}
); }
